title: SPBR-Kaleidoscope Cookery
description: PBR support has been provided for the Kaleidoscope Cookery mod
body:
This pack adds normals, parallax, reflection, luminescence, and subsurface scattering to Kaleidoscope Cookery according to LabPBR standards. Please read the[SPBR](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/spbr)


*All display images were taken using iterationRP shader!
![Made reflective texture and normal texture according to labpbr standard](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dc545b353cde3249eb3edb74f8507f711382b716.jpeg)![Made reflective texture and normal texture according to labpbr standard](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/806d404c62b48fca53185547f93ef837742e25fa.jpeg)![Made reflective texture and normal texture according to labpbr standard](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1d97163adef185501e08735c50ea572ac037bf12.jpeg)![Made reflective texture and normal texture according to labpbr standard](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f2f7718d14486f4bb80e87e086b4cfc51ce03720.jpeg)![Made reflective texture and normal texture according to labpbr standard](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/78f76af9f48883dd4d10d199ed561f4337967392.jpeg)
